<!-- Thanks for contributing to KAINE. Keep PRs focused and green. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / behavior
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup (no behavior change)
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] CI / tooling / repo config

## Checklist

- [ ] Behavior changes are backed by an OpenSpec change under `openspec/changes/` (design-first).
- [ ] `.venv/bin/python -m pytest` passes locally; new/changed behavior has tests.
- [ ] Docs updated to match the code (this repo's docs describe current reality).
- [ ] No entity is booted by this change, and all modules still ship disabled.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or operator-specific details (hostnames, private-mesh IPs, private voice names) in the diff, commits, or PR text.
- [ ] Commits use the project identity, not a personal email.

## Related

<!-- Link issues / OpenSpec changes this addresses. -->
